heading: Medicare Prescription Drug Account in the Federal Supplementary Medical Insurance Trust Fund
label: 1395w–116 Medicare Prescription Drug Account in the Federal Supplementary Medical Insurance Trust Fund

children.heading: Establishment and operation of Account
children.label: a Establishment and operation of Account

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: 1 Establishment
children.text: There is created within the Federal Supplementary Medical Insurance Trust Fund established by an account to be known as the “Medicare Prescription Drug Account” (in this section referred to as the “Account”).section 1395t of this title

children.heading: Funding
children.label: 2 Funding
children.text: The Account shall consist of such gifts and bequests as may be made as provided in , accrued interest on balances in the Account, and such amounts as may be deposited in, or appropriated to, such Account as provided in this part.section 401(i)(1) of this title

children.heading: Separate from rest of Trust Fund
children.label: 3 Separate from rest of Trust Fund
children.text: Funds provided under this part to the Account shall be kept separate from all other funds within the Federal Supplementary Medical Insurance Trust Fund, but shall be invested, and such investments redeemed, in the same manner as all other funds and investments within such Trust Fund.

children.label: A
children.text: payments under (relating to low-income subsidy payments);section 1395w–114 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: payments under (relating to subsidy payments and payments for fallback plans);section 1395w–115 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: payments to sponsors of qualified retiree prescription drug plans under ;section 1395w–132(a) of this title

children.label: D
children.text: payments with respect to administrative expenses under this part in accordance with ; andsection 401(g) of this title

children.label: E
children.text: payments under (relating to selected drug subsidy payments).section 1395w–114d of this title

children.heading: Transfers to Medicaid account for increased administrative costs
children.label: 2 Transfers to Medicaid account for increased administrative costs
children.text: The Managing Trustee shall transfer from time to time from the Account to the Grants to States for Medicaid account amounts the Secretary certifies are attributable to increases in payment resulting from the application of .section 1396u–5(b) of this title

children.heading: Payments of premiums withheld
children.label: 3 Payments of premiums withheld
children.text: The Managing Trustee shall make payment to the PDP sponsor or MA organization involved of the premiums (and the portion of late enrollment penalties) that are collected in the manner described in and that are payable under a prescription drug plan or MA–PD plan offered by such sponsor or organization.section 1395w–24(d)(2)(A) of this title

children.heading: Treatment in relation to part B premium
children.label: 4 Treatment in relation to part B premium
children.text: Amounts payable from the Account shall not be taken into account in computing actuarial rates or premium amounts under .section 1395r of this title

children.heading: Low-income transfer
children.label: 1 Low-income transfer
children.text: Amounts paid under (and any amounts collected or offset under paragraph (1)(C) of such section) are deposited into the Account.section 1396u–5(c) of this title

children.heading: Amounts withheld
children.label: 2 Amounts withheld
children.text: Pursuant to sections 1395w–113(c) and 1395w–24(d) of this title (as applied under this part), amounts that are withheld (and allocated) to the Account are deposited into the Account.

children.heading: Appropriations to cover Government contributions
children.label: 3 Appropriations to cover Government contributions
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated from time to time, out of any moneys in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, to the Account, an amount equivalent to the amount of payments made from the Account under subsection (b) plus such amounts as the Managing Trustee certifies is necessary to maintain an appropriate contingency margin, reduced by the amounts deposited under paragraph (1) or subsection (a)(2).

children.heading: Initial funding and reserve
children.label: 4 Initial funding and reserve
children.text: In order to assure prompt payment of benefits provided under this part and the administrative expenses thereunder during the early months of the program established by this part and to provide an initial contingency reserve, there are authorized to be appropriated to the Account, out of any moneys in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, such amount as the Secretary certifies are required, but not to exceed 10 percent of the estimated total expenditures from such Account in 2006.

children.heading: Transfer of any remaining balance from Transitional Assistance Account
children.label: 5 Transfer of any remaining balance from Transitional Assistance Account
children.text: Any balance in the Transitional Assistance Account that is transferred under shall be deposited into the Account.section 1395w–141(k)(5) of this title
